mapper.insert: insert into kh_user_disease_detail (user_disease_id, illness, treatment) values (#{userDiseaseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{illness,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{treatment,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.delete: delete from kh_user_disease_detail where user_disease_id in (select id from kh_user_disease where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT})
